title: ctenitis manilensis
intro: Ctenitis manilensis, also known as Manila fern, is a species of fern native to the Philippines. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used for its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis manilensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from different ailments.
